Juggernaut

Fabricator Marshal Rizzon Zau stands before you - or her body, anyway. Her mind is locked away, overridden by the inexorable pressure of an AI’s instantly reconfigurable body-jacking scripts. The giant zaika’s heavily augmented body glows faintly, her cybernetics clocked up to the absolute breaking point. Heat radiates off of her in waves as she hefts her multibarrelled autocannon vaguely in your direction, more than willing to destroy any organic life that threatens Ehura’s vision of Paragon’s future.

Overtaken by an untested mod, Fabricator Marshal Rizzon Zau’s body almost looks almost mutated. Her digitally controlled, cable-corded muscles bulge obscenely, radiating a heat and light from the cracks like crusted over lava. The rotary autocannon in her hands looks almost tiny by comparison - a tank barrel would be a better fit. She howls in bestial rage as she confronts you, burning herself out for one final, glorious battle.
\n"+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"You dive":e.getCombatName()+" dives")+" through her legs at the last second.
She hits!
\n"+("PlayerCharacter"===n.getClassName()?"Ow!":Ot.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName())+" can’t dodge Zau’s voice!")
\nThe overheating weapon seizes up with a horrendous screech. Zau’s overloaded weapon can no longer fire!
\n"+Ot.m.capitalize(n.getCombatName())+" "+("PlayerCharacter"===n.getClassName()||n.isPlural?"are":"is")+" shocked!
\n"+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"You dodge":e.getCombatName()+" dodges")+", and Zau pivots with the aid of back-mounted thrusters to face "+e.getCombatName()+" once more!
\nShe connects!
...But she didn’t count on slamming into an even stouter foe! Zau deflects off to one side with a wince, staggered!
The impact throws you, but you twist around to keep your [pc.feet] under you, staggered instead of knocked prone!
The impact throws "+e.getCombatName()+" flat on the ground, staggered and tripped!
